SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdminDashboardActivity
Represents the screen that can be used to view navigation options.
AdminDashboardActivityTest
 
CancelledFragment
A simple Fragment subclass.
DeepLinkRouterActivity
Acts as a router and dispatcher for Android Deep Links.
DeepLinkRouterActivityTest
 
DeletionUtils
Utility class for handling complex cascade deletions to ensure data integrity.
DeletionUtilsTest
Instrumented test to verify the cascading deletion logic in DeletionUtils.
EnrolledFragment
A simple Fragment subclass.
EntrantAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for displaying entrants in organizer fragments.
EntrantDashboardActivity
Acts as the primary navigation dashboard for Entrant users.
EntrantDashboardActivityTest
Test to verify navigation intents fired from the EntrantDashboardActivity.
EntrantListActivity
Displays the list of entrants currently on the event's waiting list.
EntrantListActivityTest
 
EntrantProfile
Represents a user profile within the application.
EntrantProfileTest
Local unit tests for the EntrantProfile model class.
Event
Represents an Event entity within the application.
EventDetailsActivity
Displays detailed information about a specific event.
EventDetailsActivityTest
 
EventHistory
Displays a history of events the Entrant has interacted with, specifically focusing on events where they are currently on the waiting list.
EventHistoryTest
Instrumented test to verify the logic and data fetching of the EventHistory screen.
EventListActivity
Displays a list of all currently available events the user can enroll in.
EventListActivityTest
 
EventQrCodeActivity
Displays the QR code for an event.
EventQrCodeActivityTest
Instrumented test to verify the logic and exporting qr code in the QrCode activity screen
EventRepository
Handles storing, retrieving, and updating Event objects in Firebase.
EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<T>
Callback interface used to return the result of async repo operations.
EventRepositoryTest
Local unit tests for the EventRepository repo class.
EventTest
 
InvitedFragment
Fragment displaying invited entrants for an event.
LotteryUtils
Utility class for lottery sampling logic.
LotteryUtilsTest
Unit tests for LotteryUtils.
MainActivity
The initial entry point of the Get Out There application.
MainActivityTest
Instrumented test to verify navigation routing from the MainActivity.
ManageEventsActivity
Represents the screen that can be used to view events.
ManageEventsActivityTest
Instrumented test to verify the logic and data of deleting events from the database
ManageImagesActivity
Represents the screen that can be used to view event posters.
ManageImagesActivityTest
Instrumented test to verify proper UI functionality of image management
ManageOrganizersActivity
Represents the screen that can be used to view event and delete event organizers as required by the administrator.
ManageOrganizersActivityTest
Unit tests for ManageOrganizersActivity logic.
ManageProfilesActivity
Represents the screen that can be used to view profiles.
ManageProfilesActivityTest
 
NotificationLogsActivity
Allows administrators to view all notifications that have been sent out to users.
NotificationLogsActivityTest
 
NotificationUtils
Utility class for building notification data.
NotificationUtilsTest
Unit tests for NotificationUtils.
OrganizerCreateEventActivity
Allows organizers to create a new event.
OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
Instrumented test to verify the logic and data saving of OrganizerCreateEvent screen
OrganizerEditEventActivity
Allows organizers to edit an existing event.
OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
Instrumented test to verify the logic and data fetching of OrganizerEditEvent screen
OrganizerEventDetailsActivity
Activity for organizer to view details of a specific event.
OrganizerEventDetailsActivityTest
Instrumented test to verify the logic and data fetching of Organizer event details activity screen
OrganizerEventListActivity
Displays a list of Events created by the current user.
OrganizerEventListActivityTest
Tests the functionality of OrganizerEventListActivity.
OrganizerTabAdapter
 
OrganizerWaitlistActivity
Activity for organizer to manage event entrants.
ProfileActivity
Allows the user to manage their personal Entrant Profile.
ProfileActivityTest
Instrumented test to verify End-to-End database operations (Save invalid input: '&' Delete) for the ProfileActivity.
QRCodeGenerator
Generates QR code images from text input.
QRCodeGeneratorTest
 
SignUpActivity
Handles the registration process for new users (Entrants).
SignUpActivityTest
Instrumented test to verify user registration and navigation intents in the SignUpActivity.
TestUtils
Utility class for common Espresso Matchers and test helpers.
WaitlistFragment
Fragment displaying the waitlist for an event.
